boundary: acceptance predicates specified but not implemented as schema validation
candidate protocol field map exists but is not validated

actdr6_release_date: date identifies the ACT DR6 public-release snapshot admitted by the protocol
date is not later than data_freeze_lock timestamp
covariance_matrix: field is bound to the protocol-approved covariance source
value is a two-dimensional numeric matrix
all entries are finite real numbers
matrix satisfies the protocol symmetry predicate
matrix satisfies the protocol positive-semidefinite predicate
data_freeze_lock: lock identifies the frozen admissible payload
lock records timestamp or immutable content digest
lock covers data_vector, covariance_matrix, mask, likelihood_rule, statistical_threshold, protocol_hash, and actdr6_release_date
data_vector: field is bound to the protocol-approved data-vector source
value is a one-dimensional numeric array
all entries are finite real numbers
likelihood_rule: field identifies the exact protocol likelihood rule
rule consumes data_vector, covariance_matrix, and mask
rule output type is the protocol likelihood statistic
rule version is frozen by protocol_hash
mask: field is bound to the protocol-approved mask source
value is a one-dimensional boolean or zero-one array
at least one entry is active
protocol_hash: hash identifies the frozen protocol specification
hash covers field keys, field sources, acceptance predicates, likelihood_rule, statistical_threshold, and data_freeze_lock
